pageContext.name: Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Amiami X Amakuni are proud to present the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon Collectible Figure! Featuring the resulting fusion of three Blue Eyes White Dragons, already a legendary and powerful card within the world of Yu-Gi-Oh! The Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon is a powerful, three-headed monster that strikes fear into its opponents with both high attack and defense! In the anime, the monster appears in both the original series as well as Yu-Gi-Oh! GX, used by Seto Kaiba and the mysterious Kaibaman.  Order yours today, and bring this legendary card to life!
